name: SPRIX, Ltd.
summary: SPRIX, Ltd. operates as an educational company in Japan. It offers various online learning contents, including planning and development of educational apps that include learning videos and manga; operates Morijuku, a private tutoring school and RED, an independent online learning school; operates a recruitment site for cram school teachers; and operates Tokyo Dance Village, a dance school. The company also develops and sells teaching materials for cram schools for elementary, junior high, and high schools, as well as produces and sells Chinese language education and reading education programs. SPRIX, Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
